problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: DNA computing for massively parallel search may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
